Home.title: ViraStack
Home.description: High-performance Frontend architectures and developer-centric tools for modern software standards.
Home.aboutSeoBody: ViraStack is a modern frontend ecosystem that brings the React and Next.js landscape together with high-discipline standards. By transforming complex configurations into productized architectures, it provides a fast, scalable, and sustainable development foundation for projects of any scale. With AI-aligned protocols and ready-to-use starter kits, it aims to maximize developer productivity to the fullest.

Roadmap.title: Roadmap
Roadmap.description: What we are building next across the ViraStack ecosystem: upcoming and in-progress projects, experiments, and releases—so you can see what is planned and how priorities evolve.

Community.title: Community
Community.homeTeaser: The growth and reach of ViraStack depend on our community. Starring our projects on GitHub is the most effective way to help us grow and shape what we build next.
Community.description1: The growth and reach of ViraStack depend directly on our community. The most effective way to help us grow and keep this ecosystem sustainable is by starring our projects on GitHub to increase our visibility.
Community.description2: Every star given to our upcoming projects serves as a great motivation and helps us prioritize future features.
Community.description3: Thank you for building ViraStack with us.

About.metaTitle: About ViraStack: Modern Frontend Ecosystem | ViraStack
About.metaDescription: What is ViraStack? React and Next.js-based starter templates, AI Rules, development principles, and an open source community. A sustainable frontend ecosystem for individual developers and small teams.
About.intro: It is an open production ground built with high-performance architectures and modern software standards, developer-focused. It is for all developers who want to work with speed, advanced file architecture, and modular packages.
About.whatIsBody: It is a highly disciplined development ground that brings the React, Next.js, and TypeScript ecosystem together in its most efficient form. ViraStack aims to offer quality, sustainable, and repeatable architecture for projects of every scale by transforming complex configuration processes into productized standards.
About.perfBody: We offer architectures that are scalable, readable, and optimized with modern technologies. We integrate the latest libraries into your project without performance concerns.
About.dxBody: We minimize repetitive work with starter kits, custom hooks, and micro helpers. We design flows that let the developer focus only on business logic.
About.archBody: Thanks to TypeScript and clear boundaries, we remove the burden of "deciding from scratch on every project." We set strict but flexible standards that ensure consistency within the team.
About.aiBody: We establish a sustainable order where humans and AI meet in the same architectural language. With AI Rules protocols we improve the code generation quality of assistants.
About.starterBody: We offer professional starter templates that provide the fastest entry to the project with consistent file layout, production-ready structure, and reusable patterns. These templates fully meet modern frontend needs.
About.helpersBody: We lighten your daily workload with practical packages that ease form management, architectural rules that discipline the AI code-writing process, and guides that summarize modern web standards.
About.roadmapBody: With projects such as <start>Start (CLI)</start>, <standards>Standards</standards>, and <errorguard>Error Guard</errorguard> we complete the ecosystem end to end. Our future vision is to create a secure and scalable development pipeline at every stage.
About.communityBody: To contribute, <github>by starring our GitHub projects</github> you can give us visibility, and with your feedback you can shape the direction of the ecosystem. You can visit <community>our community page</community> or contribute directly to the codebase.

Maintainers.title: Maintainers
Maintainers.description1: The developers who ensure the continuity of ViraStack projects, uphold high-discipline standards, and contribute to the open-source ecosystem.
Maintainers.description2: To join our vision, contribute to our projects, or get technical support, feel free to reach out through our community channels.
Maintainers.description3: We are building the future of frontend architectures together.

Projects.aiRules: AI-native architecture kit and high-discipline protocols for modern React applications.
Projects.inputMask: Lightweight, zero-dependency input masking library optimized for React Hook Form.
Projects.passwordToggle: Fully accessible and highly customizable password visibility hook for React.
Projects.cli: Automated scaffolding tool to initialize and scale high-discipline ViraStack architectures.
Projects.modernWeb: Master modern web development standards in just 3 minutes.
Projects.tanstackBoilerplate: Production-ready TanStack Start starter template built with Tailwind CSS 4 and TypeScript.
Projects.standards: Zero-config ESLint and Prettier suite ensuring absolute code integrity across every project.
Projects.errorGuard: Pro-grade error handling and smart recovery protocols for zero-friction React environments.

Dashboard.description: Open-source boilerplate for modern Next.js applications, featuring <react>React</react>, <typescript>TypeScript</typescript>, <tailwind>Tailwind CSS</tailwind>, and <tanstack>TanStack Query</tanstack>. Includes reusable components, hooks, and utilities to speed up development.

AuthSchema.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
AuthSchema.usernameRegex: Only letters, numbers and underscores are allowed
AuthSchema.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

Features.title: Features
Features.description: Core technologies and best practices included out of the box.

appRouter.title: Next.js App Router
appRouter.description: Built on Next.js 16 App Router with file-based routing and server-first patterns for performance and simplicity.

typeSafety.title: TypeScript & Type-Safe Env
typeSafety.description: First-class TypeScript across the stack plus runtime-validated environment variables (Zod, @t3-oss/env-nextjs) for safer code and deployments.

query.title: TanStack Query
query.description: Smart caching, background revalidation, and devtools for reliable, reactive data flows—ready out of the box.

i18n.title: Internationalization (i18n)
i18n.description: Locale-aware routing and messages with next-intl, plus a built-in Locale Switcher for global-ready apps.

forms.title: React Hook Form & Zod
forms.description: Type-safe schemas, accessible inputs, and high-performance forms.

ui.title: Tailwind CSS & shadcn/ui
ui.description: Accessible, composable UI primitives built with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui for rapid development and consistent design.

Showcase.title: Showcase
Showcase.description: A showcase of the features of the project.

AIRules.title: ViraStack AI
AIRules.description: Architectural discipline and specialized .mdc context rules for AI-native React development. Features elite engineering protocols and production-ready constraints to stop AI from lazy-coding.

hero.description: <discipline>Architectural discipline</discipline> and specialized <mdc>.mdc</mdc> context rules for <ainative>AI-native</ainative> <react>React</react> development. Features <protocols>elite engineering protocols</protocols> and <production>production-ready</production> constraints to stop AI from lazy-coding.

terminal.try: Try: Ask AI to plan a new feature.

before.title: Disorganized & Error-Prone
before.description: Without strict guidelines, AI produces functional but undisciplined code that fails production standards.
before.list1: No type safety or schema validation
before.list5: Poor UX with no loading skeletons

after.title: Production-Ready Code
after.description: ViraStack AI enforces strict architectural patterns for disciplined, scalable code.

principles.title: Core Principles
principles.description: Built-in rules that force your AI to write high-quality, scalable code.

card1.title: Architectural Enforcement
card1.description: AI can't take shortcuts. It must follow ViraStack's predefined logic patterns.

card2.title: Feature-Driven Design
card2.description: Enforces strict domain-based organization for maximum scalability. Keeps your app directory clean.

card3.title: Zod-First Type Safety
card3.description: Ensures end-to-end type safety derived from schemas. AI must validate every API response.

card4.title: Next-Gen UX Standards
card4.description: Enforces best practices for Web Vitals (LCP, CLS) and efficient state management.

card5.title: Universal Support
card5.description: Works with Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, and Copilot.

workflow.title: The ViraStack Protocol
workflow.description: A 3-step workflow for complex features to ensure production standards.

interactive.prompt: Build a data table for users with server-side pagination, search, and role filtering.

steps.step1: Define Zod schemas for query parameters and API response
steps.step2: Setup nuqs for type-safe URL state management
steps.step3: Implement TanStack Query for data fetching and caching
steps.step4: Create Skeleton table for loading state

Step6.title: Artificial Intelligence
Step6.description1: Our coding habits are changing; instead of entering every line manually, we now design living interfaces by giving the right directives to artificial intelligence.
Step6.prompt: Generate 3 minimalist micro-widgets for a 'Modern Web' dashboard, incorporating the design ethos of Wiggle UI and utilizing shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS: 1. A stock tracker for NVIDIA ($NVDA) with a green price chart. 2. A live match tracker for Turkey vs Spain (2026 World Cup) with a 'Live' indicator. 3. A sleek weather widget with a simple sun icon.
Step6.description2: The interfaces of the future are no longer static, but smart and interactive. Everything looks great!

Step7.title: Congratulations! 🎉
Step7.description1: From a static structure; we have reached a living, modern experience with the power of Next.js, the speed of Tailwind 4, and an AI-Native architecture.
Step7.description2: ViraStack is a comprehensive Frontend Ecosystem designed to elevate modern software standards. We bridge the gap between complex architectures and seamless Developer Experience (DX). By providing production-ready boilerplates, high-discipline AI protocols, and zero-dependency utility tools, we empower developers to build high-performance, accessible, and scalable web applications with uncompromising quality.

Metadata.title: Modern Web in 3 Minutes | ViraStack
Metadata.description: Learn the basics of modern web design step by step.
